name: Modify OCO Order
summary: Modifies an existing OCO (One-Cancels-the-Other) / alert order. A POST call to /ModifyOCOOrder with jData (a JSON object containing the order/alert fields plus nested oivariable and place_order_params arrays) and jKey returns "OI replaced" with the alert id on success.

request_params.name: jData
request_params.description: Should send json object with fields in below list.

json_fields.name: uid
json_fields.description: User id of the logged in user.

json_fields.name: tsym
json_fields.description: Unique id of contract on which order to be placed. (use url encoding to avoid special char error for symbols like M&M)

json_fields.name: exch
json_fields.description: Exchange

json_fields.name: validity
json_fields.description: Validity

json_fields.name: ai_t
json_fields.description: Alert type. (Doc text and page image read 'ai_t*'; likely a typo for 'al_t', the alert-type counterpart to 'al_id'.)

json_fields.name: al_id
json_fields.description: Alert id

json_fields.name: exchsym
json_fields.description: Exchange symbol

json_fields.name: oivariable
json_fields.description: Array Object, details given below (see OIVARIABLE FORMAT).

json_fields.name: place_order_params
json_fields.description: Array Object, details given below (see PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS FORMAT).

json_fields.name: oivariable.d
json_fields.description: OIVARIABLE FORMAT field: Data to be compared with LTP.

json_fields.name: oivariable.var_name
json_fields.description: OIVARIABLE FORMAT field: Variable Name.

json_fields.name: place_order_params.tsym
json_fields.description: PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS FORMAT field: Trading symbol of the scrip (contract).

json_fields.name: place_order_params.exch
json_fields.description: PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS FORMAT field: Exchange.

json_fields.name: place_order_params.trantype
json_fields.description: PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS FORMAT field: B -> BUY, S -> SELL [transtype should be 'B' or 'S' else reject].

json_fields.name: place_order_params.prctyp
json_fields.description: PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS FORMAT field: Price Type.

json_fields.name: place_order_params.prd
json_fields.description: PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS FORMAT field: Product.

json_fields.name: place_order_params.ret
json_fields.description: PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS FORMAT field: Retention type [ret should be DAY / EOS / IOC else reject].

json_fields.name: place_order_params.actid
json_fields.description: PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS FORMAT field: Acct Id.

json_fields.name: place_order_params.uid
json_fields.description: PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS FORMAT field: User Id.

json_fields.name: place_order_params.ordersource
json_fields.description: PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS FORMAT field: Used to generate exchange info fields.

json_fields.name: place_order_params.remarks
json_fields.description: PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS FORMAT field: Any tag by user to mark order.

json_fields.name: place_order_params.qty
json_fields.description: PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS FORMAT field: Order Quantity [If qty is junk value other than numbers].

json_fields.name: place_order_params.prc
json_fields.description: PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS FORMAT field: Order Price [If prc is junk value other than numbers] "Order price cannot be zero".

json_fields.name: place_order_params.trgprc
json_fields.description: PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS FORMAT field: New trigger price in case of SL-LMT.

response_fields.name: stat
response_fields.description: OCO order success or failure indication. i. "stat":"OI replaced" - incase of success ii. "stat":"Invalid Oi" - incase of failure.

response_fields.name: request_time
response_fields.description: This will be present only in a successful response.

response_fields.name: emsg
response_fields.description: This will be present only in case of errors. That is: 1) Invalid Input 2) Session Expired.

notes: REST POST. Authoritative URL: https://piconnect.flattrade.in/PiConnectAPI/ModifyOCOOrder. The jData schema is hierarchical: oivariable and place_order_params are nested array objects whose sub-fields are documented in the OIVARIABLE FORMAT (page 38) and PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS FORMAT (page 39) tables; here flattened with oivariable./place_order_params. prefixes to disambiguate. The field 'ai_t*' is recorded verbatim from the page image/text but is almost certainly a typo for 'al_t' (alert type), the counterpart to 'al_id'. The failure-response stat value in the sample ('Not_Ok') differs from the documented failure indicator ('Invalid Oi'); both come straight from the source page.
issues: The field listed as 'ai_t*' in the cleaned text and page image is recorded verbatim but appears to be a typo for 'al_t' (alert type), the counterpart to 'al_id' (alert id). The 'validity' possible value is 'DAY or GTT' per the page-38 image (distinct from the place_order_params 'ret' retention which is DAY/EOS/IOC). Some jData fields (exchsym, oivariable, place_order_params) lack a trailing '*' in the doc, so marked required=false. Nested-array sub-fields are prefixed (oivariable./place_order_params.) to disambiguate within the flat field list. The sample failure-response stat ('Not_Ok') differs from the documented failure value ('Invalid Oi') — both are reproduced from the source.
